title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, July 19 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 19/07/2022
Image reference: 2022-07-19_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-july-19-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Handysize values have softened
Panamax Theresa Shandong (82,000 DWT, May 2012, Jiangsu Eastern) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 22.00 mil, VV Value USD 19.54 mil - SS Due. Panamax Fortune Union (73,700 DWT, Nov 1998, Sumitomo) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 8.50 mil, VV Value USD 10.70 mil. Ultramax Soho Mandate (61,000 DWT, Jul 2016, Dalian COSCO KHI) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 31.00 mil, VV Value USD 29.00 mil.
